claims.summary: Exact marker handling can be mechanically correct while still feeling viscous.
claims.disposition: Preserve the felt viscosity claim and route a bounded dialogue comparison; parser correctness does not resolve it.

claims.summary: Marker evidence should not be joined causally to spectral or felt state.
claims.disposition: Verified exact occurrence, token-relation, bounded felt-pressure, and spectral-context records remain separate and non-causal.
